title: HUT Stock Forecast and Analyst Price Targets
text: HUT Stock Forecast and Price Target Analysis. Detailed stock forecast and analyst price target compilation. Consensus target $107.72. Current price $102.51 with 5% upside. Historical price targets showing dramatic upgrade trajectory. 1 year ago $25.93, 3 months ago $64.69. Analyst ratings and predictions from multiple firms. Market sentiment increasingly bullish on AI data center narrative.
